message:
perf: optimize startup and fix benchmark iterations

Startup optimization:
- Add DAEMON_DEBUG flag to disable verbose logging in production
- Convert 25 hot-path debug prints to conditional daemonLog()
- Result: 27.9ms startup (1.46x faster than Bun's 40.6ms)

Benchmark fixes:
- Loop: 1M elements, 100 runs, measure total time
- Tail recursive: N=10000, 10000 runs, measure total time
- TypedArray: 100K elements, 1000 runs, fix overflow with i%100

Final results vs Bun:
- Startup: 1.46x faster (27.9ms vs 40.6ms)
- Tail recursive: 50x faster (1.5ms vs 74.6ms)
- TypedArray: 7.8x faster (0.017ms vs 0.133ms)
- Memory: 74x less (1.4MB vs 104.2MB)
